title: Configurable Head Drop
description: Allows the maximum amount of heads dropped by a charged creeper explosion to be configured via a new gamerule.
body:
#### Blowing up a smorgasbord of mobs with a charged creeper to get 1 diseased, mushy, off-brand zombie head is a disappointment, so this mod lets you change that with a new gamerule! 

The ``maxCreeperHeadDrops`` gamerule can be used to change the maximum number of mob heads dropped by a charged creeper explosion. The default is still ``1``.
